blockedMechanics.variantSpecificExposedInstanceSwapDefaul: Figma synchronizes an exposed nested-instance default across a component set.
blockedMechanics.manualXYInsideAutoLayout: Auto Layout owns child coordinates; use padding, spacers, absolute positioning, or a non-auto-layout holder.
blockedMechanics.rotatedSemanticIcon: Use the semantic directional icon instead of rotating a different glyph.

instanceSwap: swapped instance bounds are normalized after swap
negativeSpacing: paint order and overlap region are screenshot-verified at 2x
assetUpload: image hash, fill mode, clipping, intrinsic size, and placed size match source
